name: Corpse
description:
You hit the streets to go buy something and suddenly you realize you got lost and somehow ended up in the worst part of your city. There are drunkards and criminals all over the place, but there's someone else that seems to be a much more interesting person... or whatever she is.

I had this character in my list for ages and it's also been requested a few days ago so here she is. By the way, we're already close to 600 followers, what the hell. You guys are neat

[Art and character are from igxxiii]
creator: forcedattrition
